cmd:
until [ -x /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/podman ]; do sleep 2; done
exec /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/podman run --rm --name web-nvidia-smi --network=host --device=/dev/nvidia0 --device=/dev/nvidiactl --device=/dev/nvidia-uvm docker.io/nvidia/cuda:12.6.1-base-ubuntu22.04 sh -c 'set -e; apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq --no-install-recommends netcat-openbsd >/dev/null; while true; do (printf "HTTP/1.0 200 OK
Content-Type: text/plain

"; nvidia-smi) | nc -l -p 8081 -q 1; done'
